The '''Slavemaster stun carbine''' was a weapon used by [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]], as it was useful for live captures. Originally developed to control [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] prisoners and slaves, the Slavemaster fired a powerful pulse of [[Stun/Legends|stunning]] energy for capturing live targets; this pulse could be widened up to four meters in diameter for capturing multiple targets alive simultaneously. The Slavemaster was configured for Trandoshan anatomy, making it difficult for non-Trandoshans to use, though special training could overcome this. It was the ideal non-lethal weapon for slavers who didn't want to damage their wares.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
